basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Project Post Doctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on [Release Date] on the official website [official website]. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Project Post Doctoral Fellow: Ph.D. in Electronics/Electrical Engineering from a reputed institute/university. Strong background in Electronics. Expertise in Metamaterial/Metasurface, its fabrication and measurement. Proficiency in EM simulation tools like HFSS, CST Microwave studio, etc. Experience in design and analysis of Active Metasurfaces is preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow positions is 10th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow position is a Ph.D. in Electronics or Electrical Engineering from a recognized institute or university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 85,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Kanpur Project Post Doctoral Fellow recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Kanpur will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will contain all detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Post Doctoral Fellow position is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q10. What specific experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Experience in design and analysis of Active Metasurfaces is preferred for candidates applying for the Project Post Doctoral Fellow position.
